scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "PB_ENCRYPTION_KEY=naturelap_dev_encryption_key_123 PB_SUPERUSER_EMAIL=admin@naturelap.local PB_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD=naturelap_dev_admin_pw npm run dev --prefix apps/pocketbase"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run start --prefix apps/api" "PB_ENCRYPTION_KEY=naturelap_dev_encryption_key_123 PB_SUPERUSER_EMAIL=admin@naturelap.local PB_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD=naturelap_dev_admin_pw npm run start --prefix apps/pocketbase"
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm run lint --prefix apps/web" "npm run lint --prefix apps/api"
